summary: Iteration 186: Tested the new 60-second countdown timer on the OTP 'Resend code' button on the customer signup page. ALL 7 TESTS PASSED. Used 'apex-holding' partner code (not 'automate-accounts' which is blocked for customer signup — see notes).

minor.issue: 'automate-accounts' is the DEFAULT_TENANT_ID (platform admin code) which blocks customer signup with HTTP 403. The review_request instructs testers to use 'automate-accounts' as localStorage partner code, but it cannot complete registration. The signup form DOES appear (website-settings returns 200 for it), but form submission fails silently with 403. Use 'apex-holding' for customer signup testing.

action_items: INFORMATIONAL: 'automate-accounts' is DEFAULT_TENANT_ID - customer signup is intentionally blocked (403). Review request should reference 'apex-holding' for testing customer signup flow. No code change needed.

The initial countdown shows ~56s when captured (not 60s exactly) because ~4 seconds elapses between form submission and the test read. This is correct behavior — the countdown starts at 60 when setResendCountdown(60) is called synchronously after API success.
critical_code_review_comments: Timer logic is clean and correct: useEffect with setTimeout chaining (lines 55-59), setResendCountdown(60) called on both first send (line 182) and resend (line 215).
Resend button correctly uses: disabled={resendingOtp || resendCountdown > 0} and displays: resendCountdown > 0 ? `Resend in ${resendCountdown}s` : 'Resend code' (line 478).
data-testid='resend-otp-btn' properly placed for test automation.

test_credentials.partner_code_requested_by_review: automate-accounts (BLOCKED for customer signup — is DEFAULT_TENANT_ID)

seed_data_creation: Created 1 test user (timer_test_1772679289@timertest.com) — DELETED after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Countdown timer on OTP step is fully working. Key behavior: after form submit OR after resend, resendCountdown=60 starts counting down every second via useEffect+setTimeout. Resend button disabled while countdown>0. Verify button disabled until all 6 OTP boxes filled. Back to form link works. Partner code 'automate-accounts' = DEFAULT_TENANT_ID, customer signup blocked (403). Use 'apex-holding' for customer signup testing.

test_results_detail.T1_redirect_without_partner_code: PASS - Navigating to /signup without aa_partner_code in localStorage redirects to /login
test_results_detail.T2_form_with_partner_code: PASS - Setting aa_partner_code='apex-holding' shows signup form at /signup
test_results_detail.T3_otp_step_after_submit: PASS - Submitting full valid form shows verify-step with 6 OTP boxes
test_results_detail.T4_resend_countdown_immediate: PASS - Resend button shows 'Resend in 56s' (60s - ~4s elapsed) and disabled=true immediately
test_results_detail.T5_countdown_decrements: PASS - 56s → 51s in 5 seconds (5s decrease), button still disabled
test_results_detail.T6_verify_button_disabled_partial: PASS - Verify button disabled with 0 digits, still disabled with 3/6, enabled with 6/6
test_results_detail.T7_back_to_form: PASS - 'Back to form' button navigates back to signup form
